title: smilax shuttleworthii
intro: Smilax shuttleworthii, also known as the Cape smilax or Smilax, is a flowering plant species in the Smilacaceae family. It is a woody climber with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Smilax shuttleworthii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
